bridge_ip_address.title: Bridge IP Address
bridge_ip_address.description: IP address of your Aqua Connect Home Network device (e.g., 192.168.1.65)

exclude_accessories.title: Exclude Accessories
exclude_accessories.description: Accessories to exclude from Homebridge. Uncheck to disable.

request_timeout.title: Request Timeout (ms)
request_timeout.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 5000

retry_attempts.title: Retry Attempts
retry_attempts.description: Number of retry attempts for failed requests. Default: 3
